channel.title: Sieve on Jasper's Technical Notebook
channel.description: Recent content in Sieve on Jasper's Technical Notebook

item.title: Number Theory #0: Common Formulae — Legendre's Formula & Divisor Convolutions
item.description: Legendre’s formula, divisor and multiple convolutions in O(n log n), offline-difference batch processing for H(n)=Σf(d)g(⌊n/d⌋).

item.title: Number Theory #3: From Eratosthenes to Möbius Inclusion-Exclusion
item.description: Eratosthenes sieve for μ; g/f/h framework; Conclusions 1 and 2 with derivations and tables; GCD table intuition; CF 803F Coprime Subsequences with bottom-up and Möbius approaches.

item.title: Number Theory #3~4: Sieve Problems — Coin System DP via Sieve
item.description: Sieve + DP for a coin-system problem: greedy optimality under divisibility-chain denominations, optimal substructure, transition by saved coin count, and full code.
